channel.title: Freaky on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Freaky on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: Mouse
item.description: Being afraid of clowns seems like something of a trendy phobia these days. I’m afraid of them because I once saw an appallingly skinny man dressed as an evil clown throw his head back and swallow a live mouse.

item.title: Text
item.description: Sorry honey held up at office going 2 b late home So who the hell just parked your car in the garage?!
